description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a prominent stock that appears to be skeletonized for reduced weight and improved maneuverability. The main body is blocky and robust, with a large, detachable magazine extending downward in front of the trigger guard. A rail-mounted optic, likely a red dot sight, is positioned on top of the receiver for rapid target acquisition. The barrel is straight and of standard length, ending with no visible muzzle device. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments. The grip is ergonomic, and the rifle includes a forward vertical grip for enhanced control during firing.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, detachable magazine, and rail-mounted optic. It has a robust, modern design suited for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skeletonized stock, large magazine, rail-mounted optic, and forward grip.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the optic and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the features of the first side, including the stock, magazine, and optic.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the stock's open structure and the straight alignment of the barrel and receiver.
